# Negative test manifest for regress.sh's CMM negative phase.
# Each fixture is a malformed .cmm that cmmcomp MUST reject with a clean
# non-zero exit (never a crash, never a silent accept) and the listed
# diagnostic substring (matched against -en output).
#
# format:  <fixture.cmm>|<expected substring>
# (lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored)
#
# These live in NegTests/ — a sibling of Tests/ — on purpose: the CI smoke
# test does `find Compilers/CMMComp/Tests -name '*.cmm'` and compiles every
# hit, so a deliberately-broken .cmm under Tests/ would fail CI.
syntax.cmm|Syntax error
no_main.cmm|main() function
garbage.cmm|Syntax error
undeclared.cmm|declared the variable
define_recursive.cmm|declare the variable
